# CI gate and guide-pair evidence

Scope:
- #13616: `check:agents-claude` fails on the OpenClaw importer fixture.
- #13617: lightweight test-workflow aggregate jobs should not depend on the self-hosted runner.
- #13620: collapsed test lanes and misleading "No test files found" output must not report green.

Commands reviewed:

```bash
node --test scripts/assert-agents-claude-identical.test.mjs
bun run check:agents-claude
bun test packages/scripts/__tests__/run-all-tests-vacuous-green-guard.test.ts
node packages/scripts/run-all-tests.mjs --plan=json --no-cloud --only=test --min-tasks=200
TEST_SCRIPT_FILTER='^test$' node packages/scripts/run-all-tests.mjs --plan=json --lane=server --no-cloud --concurrency=3 --min-tasks=8
TEST_SCRIPT_FILTER='^test$' node packages/scripts/run-all-tests.mjs --plan=json --lane=client --no-cloud --concurrency=3 --min-tasks=3
TEST_PACKAGE_FILTER='\(plugins/' TEST_SCRIPT_FILTER='^test$' node packages/scripts/run-all-tests.mjs --plan=json --only=test --no-cloud --concurrency=3 --min-tasks=100
ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file(".github/workflows/test.yml"); puts "workflow yaml ok"'
git diff --check
```

Observed results:
- `assert-agents-claude-identical.test.mjs`: 2 tests passed.
- `check:agents-claude`: PASS, 299 tracked pairs byte-identical.
- runner regression: 6 tests passed.
- plan floors: root 245 tasks, server 10 tasks, client 4 tasks, plugins 146 tasks.
- workflow YAML parsed successfully.
- whitespace check passed.

N/A:
- UI screenshots/video: no rendered UI changed.
- Real-LLM trajectories: no agent/action/prompt/model behavior changed.
- Backend/frontend logs: no runtime server or browser path changed.
